name: Everything You Ever Wanted on a Bagel... But
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
1. Mix mayonnaise, mustard, onion, chopped dill pickle, celery seeds, and pepper in a small bowl.
2. Add the cabbage mixture to the bowl and stir gently. Refrigerate for several hours to allow flavors to meld.
3. Place cheese slices on bagels.
4. Spoon half of the cabbage slaw onto each cheese slice.
5. Arrange corned beef slices over the cabbage.
6. Top with remaining cabbage slaw, liverwurst, pickle slices, and radishes using toothpicks.
7. Makes 4 servings.
